message:
Running command: 
# Correct invocation: librelane [OPTIONS] CONFIG_FILES
# --run-tag for the tag, config.json positional
mkdir -p /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr

echo "=== START WRAPPER RUN: $(date) ==="
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --run-tag wrapper_run \
  --overwrite \
  --design-dir . \
  config.json \
  2>&1 | tee /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log

echo "=== END WRAPPER RUN: $(date) ==="
echo "EXIT_CODE: $?"
